content:
Edmonton Squash Club Premium Membership

Who is an ESC Premium Membership best for

The ESC premium membership is meant for squash players who want to play with online booking privileges during the busiest times, and as few restrictions as possible. This level of membership is required for all ESL participants from October – April (7 months paid at the premium level).

What club benefits do you get

-Fob Access 5 AM – Midnight
-Fitness Equipment Access 365 days of the year
-Steam Room
-Sweat Towels & Shower Towels
-Footworker access
-Doubles Court Booking Privileges
-Doubles Drop-ins
-PlaySight camera access
-Off-Peak Singles Court Booking Privileges
-Unlimited Singles Drop-ins
-Peak Hours Singles Court Booking Privileges
-Required Membership Type for Edmonton Squash League Play October-April inclusive
-Ball Machine access

What is prime-time?

During the week, prime time is 4:30 PM – 9:00 PM. On weekends, prime-time is 10:30 AM – 3:00 PM.

What are your booking privileges

Online Booking is available by logging into Jegysoft from our “Book A Court” button. Bookings can also be made by emailing the front desk at info@edmontonsquashclub.ca.

Premium members can book courts up to 2 weeks in advance.

Premium members can book one court/day every day of the month. The only restriction is that they cannot have any more than 4 bookings during prime-time active in our system simultaneously.

Courts during non-prime time can be booked with one member name + either the Solo Court Booking profile or leaving it as an Open Booking.

Courts during prime time can be booked using the Open Booking for the second name until 48 hours prior to the court booking, at which point they will be removed from the system by the front desk unless a second name is attached.

Booking can be cancelled online 4 hours in advance. Within 4 hours of the court time, courts can only be cancelled by emailing info@edmontonsquashclub.ca. Cancellations by phone cannot be guaranteed as our staffing levels are not sufficient to ensure that phone calls will be answered or returned in a timely manner. If no attempt has been made to contact the club a $15 no show charge may be issued to the primary booking member.

What is the cost

A premium membership costs $130/month with a registration fee of $30 These prices do not include GST, so your first bill will be for $30 registration fee +$130 monthly fee + 5% GST= $168.00

Annual memberships are available for purchase with a “1-month free” discount. For new members the cost is ($0 registration fee + 11x$130 monthly fee + 5% GST)=$1501.50

How to register

Just send us an email at info@edmontonsquashclub.ca, call us at 780-306-2395 or come and visit us during staff hours, and we will get you all set up. Make sure you let us know which membership type you’re interested in so we can get you started.
